effect.smc.frost.description: Freezing effect holder like in Powder Snow block.
effect.smc.frost_burst.description: Freezing effect holder like in Powder Snow block, deal Amp * 6 + Amp * 1% * target max HP (at most 10% target max HP) Magic damage after effect expired.
effect.smc.love.description: Increasing following range, force animals in love, decrease CD for next breeding.
effect.smc.rainbow.description: Provides creative flying ability, add movement speed and rainbow particle trail.
effect.smc.frost_resistance.description: Immune Frost, Frost Burst, Slowness Effect and Freezing.
effect.smc.star_light.description: Boost Magic Damage from effect holder by Amp * 20% and apply Glowing Effect to the target.
effect.smc.chop_protection.description: Using food level to substitute health when effect holder hurts, the exceed damage will hurt on your health.
effect.smc.peace.description: Mobs will not attack effect holder, unless mob immune potion effects. Effect holder will not able to attack.
effect.smc.elbow_strike.description: Increase knock back strength, add special voices.
effect.smc.fresh_cool.description: Recover Amp * 5% of max health (at least Amp * 2) when target has Frost, Frost Burst, Slowness Effect and Freezing.
effect.smc.fever_spicy.description: Boost Fire and Explosion Damage from effect holder by Amp * 30% when target is burning.
effect.smc.fuzed.description: You'll explode like creeper after the effect expired (doesn't break blocks), also you can be powered by lightning and increase this effect level to 3
effect.smc.ocean_avatar.description: Effect holder will be regard as in water, you can keep swimming even you are not in water.
effect.smc.snow_step.description: Effect holder will placing snow layers like snow golem.
effect.smc.over_speed.description: Increase movement speed and attack speed, decrease item using duration. More than 5 level will aggravate the burden on your heart when you're running.
effect.smc.blooming.description: Apply bone meal on nearby plants.
enchantment.smc.damage_spell.desc: Increase the damage of spell bullet.
enchantment.smc.explode_spell.desc: Deal an explosion at the hit point of spell bullet (unable to break blocks), higher level will strengthen the explosion.
enchantment.smc.fire_spell.desc: Set a fire on block or targets, higher level will lengthen fire time
enchantment.smc.freeze_spell.desc: Set frozen on targets, higher level will lengthen frozen time
enchantment.smc.heal_spell.desc: Healing more health when using heal spell.
enchantment.smc.infinite_spell.desc: Grimoire will never cost Star Dust.
enchantment.smc.launch_self.desc: Launch your self instead of spell bullet!
enchantment.smc.protection_spell.desc: Add Resistance Effect when using heal spell.
enchantment.smc.strength_spell.desc: Add Strength Effect when using heal spell.
enchantment.smc.extension_spell.desc: Extend the range of heal spell.
enchantment.smc.rapid_cooling.desc: Decrease the cool down of Grimoire.
enchantment.smc.obsidian_hitting.desc: Projectile will apply 1 second Stunned effect, but the Slingshot can only shoot obsidian as bullet.
enchantment.smc.inferno_hitting.desc: Projectile will lead a small explosion, but the Slingshot can only shoot netherrack as bullet.
enchantment.smc.ender_floating.desc: Projectile will be no gravity, but the Slingshot can only shoot end stone as bullet.
enchantment.smc.wide_range.desc: Watering Can will have larger effect area.
enchantment.smc.composite_fertilizer.des: Watering Can will effective on Nether Wart, Saplings and Sweet Berries.
enchantment.smc.life_cycle.desc: Watering Can harvest max aged crops and replant it automatically.
enchantment.smc.adaption.desc: Swiss Army Knife will automatically switch the mode.
enchantment.smc.divine_judgement.desc: The extra damage from the Excalibur's sword aura is at least a certain percentage of the auras damage.
enchantment.smc.violent_archaeology.desc: Allows you getting the treasure from suspicious blocks through breaking without using brush.
enchantment.smc.anchor_hold.desc: Item with this enchantment will never be tossed when holding.
enchantment.smc.inheritance.desc: When repairing items within the crafting grid, the enchantment will be retained.
enchantment.smc.netherite_cladding.desc: Provide extra durability and fire proof ability for tools
item.smc.music_disc_laoda.desc: 牢大の小曲 - See You Again But Children
message.smc.need_strength: You don't have enough STRENGTH to pull it out.
message.smc.not_loottable: Name is not an available Loottable Resource Location!
tooltip.smc.broccoli_boots: Provides Luck and Speed when equipped.
tooltip.smc.broccoli_hoe: Has chance to get Bone Meal.
tooltip.smc.broccoli_fishing_rod: Extra luck addition, has more chance to obtain random crops.
tooltip.smc.cat_paw: You smell like a cat...perhaps some creatures think so.
tooltip.smc.carrot_pickaxe: Has chance to recover your food level when breaking blocks.
tooltip.smc.command_block_wand: Shooting magic arrows very quickly, clear nearby primed TNT when shooting.
tooltip.smc.command_block_wand_0: Put your offhand item in Gravel or Sand block by Shift + Right Click
tooltip.smc.command_block_wand_1: Creative Mode: Applying loot table for containers and suspicious blocks by Shift + Right Click after change the item name.
tooltip.smc.golden_carrot_pickaxe: Has chance to recover your food level when breaking blocks.
tooltip.smc.golden_carrot_pickaxe_1: Providing Night Vision effect when holding.
tooltip.smc.frostium_sword: Freeze the target, deal double damage to fire immune and water sensitive entities.
tooltip.smc.frostium_axe: Deal double damage and unfreeze to frozen entities.
tooltip.smc.frostium_pickaxe: Freeze all fluid blocks near by destroyed block and has faster destroy speed on Obsidian Block.
tooltip.smc.frostium_boots: Provides Jump Boost and Powder Snow Walker when equipped.
tooltip.smc.perkin_grimoire: RMB to shoot a spell bullet.
tooltip.smc.perkin_grimoire_1: RMB + LSHIFT to recover all nearby friendly entities.
tooltip.smc.perkin_grimoire_2: Each spell costs a Star Dust.
tooltip.smc.lollipop_broccoli: Editable, provide Poison Resistance effect, attack with poison effect.
tooltip.smc.lollipop_frost: Editable, provide Frost Resistance effect, attack with slowness effect.
tooltip.smc.lollipop_perkin: Editable, provide Star Light effect, turns damage type to magic.
tooltip.smc.colorful_ice_cream: Editable, it has all lollipops functions.
tooltip.smc.astera_foods: Healing you equals to the nutrition provided by this food after eat.
tooltip.smc.frost_berries:
Add Glowing effect to entities around you.
Can be planted on ice blocks, apply Frost effect when touching.
tooltip.smc.frostium_bow_1: Infinite enchantment will be effective on Frost Arrow.
tooltip.smc.sunflower_pot: Switch weather to clear, can place lights when crouching. Lights can be touched and broken when you holding this item.
tooltip.smc.wallnut_pot: Using it as a shield, can decrease the damage you receive, but you will be the target of every nearby mobs.
tooltip.smc.lucky_clover: It's time to show how lucky you are.
tooltip.smc.creative_clover: Can generate random items which banned in Lucky Clover.
tooltip.smc.ore_detector: Hold this item in main hand and hold the block item in off hand, right click to set the detecting target.
tooltip.smc.ore_detector_0: right click when crouching on block can also set the detecting target.
tooltip.smc.ore_detector_1: Hold this item in off hand to mark all nearby targets.
tooltip.smc.frostium_ore: Can be found in Frozen Ocean Biome.
tooltip.smc.blue_ice_frostium_ore: Can be found in Frozen Ocean Biome.
tooltip.smc.perkin_ore: Can be found in Sunflower Plains and Taiga Biome.
tooltip.smc.deepslate_perkin_ore: Can be found in Sunflower Plains and Taiga Biome.
tooltip.smc.watering_can: Speeding up crops growing in area, Enchantable.
tooltip.smc.copper_watering_can: Speeding up crops growing in area, Enchantable.
tooltip.smc.iron_watering_can: Speeding up crops growing in area, Enchantable.
tooltip.smc.archaeological_shovel: Unable to break Suspicious blocks and the block below them.
tooltip.smc.chop_shield: Consuming Food level to counteract shield disabling.
tooltip.smc.chop_kebab: Editable, Consumed food level will decrease the damage.
tooltip.smc.chicken_chop: Obtained by chicken which died from Lightning Creeper Explosion.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_tools: Attack with Frost Burst effect, continuing attack will increase the effect level.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_tools_1: Repairing itself when you healing (Round Down).
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_tools_2: Can apply most of weapon enchantments.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_bow_1: Infinite enchantment will be effective on Frost Arrow and Spectral Arrow.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_armors: Immune Poison, Hunger, Slowness and Darkness effects.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_armors_1: Full armor sets will enable Elytra Flight Ability, immune Fire, Freeze and Falling Damage.
tooltip.smc.spore_bud: Right-click to throw, so that the range of creatures to obtain love effect, the effect can be stacked.
tooltip.smc.mini_bedrock: Hold this item in Main Hand, you'll be invincible, but unable to move and lock your view.
tooltip.smc.mini_bedrock_1: Obtained by exploding on Bedrock with extremely low chance.
tooltip.smc.vacuum_sniffer: Can attract large area of items and clear tall grass blocks, and obtain various seeds from them.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_fishing_rod: Unique fishing loot table, have chance to get multiple items when fishing.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_bow: No arrow consumption, shooting with special arrow.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_bow_1: Hitting in raining weather will release an arrow rain, thunder weather will reinforce arrow rain with lightning.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_chip: Spawn at cloud height above player after raining, spawn more after thundering. Making sure there are no blocks near by that area.
tooltip.smc.chocolate_sword: Deal more damage to Animals and apply Poison effect.
tooltip.smc.chocolate_armor: When armor consuming durability, recover same amount of food level.
tooltip.smc.end_rod_candy: Eat me, you'll understand the true meaning of end rod.
tooltip.smc.candy_jar: Converts food to pure nutrition, and feed you automatically when you're hungry.
tooltip.smc.candy_jar_1: Can consume nutrition to release random candy in empty slot.
tooltip.smc.candy_jar_2: Consume durability when feeding and releasing.
tooltip.smc.devour_sword: Can devour Sword Items to increase attack damage. Cannot devour Sword Items which had been devoured.
tooltip.smc.devour_knife: Can devour Knife Items to increase attack damage. Cannot devour Knife Items which had been devoured.
tooltip.smc.devour_sword_1: Launch devoured sword when swinging. Each %s devoured sword will spawn 1 extra sword (Max %s swords). (target killing by flying sword is regard as killing by weapon in killer's hand)
tooltip.smc.devour_sword_3: Can change weapon skin through putting this item with another item and a Star Dust in crafting table.
tooltip.smc.devour_sword_4: Devour the Excalibur to unlock launching flying sword ability.
tooltip.smc.devour_sword_5: Devour the Zenish to change launching mode as Zenish. (target killing by flying sword is regard as killing by weapon in killer's hand)
tooltip.smc.devour_sword_6: Launch devoured sword when hold attack key.
tooltip.smc.knife: A holy heirloom of the village
tooltip.smc.knife_2: When the blade’s point touches ground
tooltip.smc.calibur: Apply high level negative effects when holding. Negative effects can be neutralized by Strength effect.
tooltip.smc.excalibur: Emitting a sword aura when swinging, which can go through entities and blocks, and causes %s%s extra damage based on target's current health.
tooltip.smc.divine_wing: Provides creative fly ability, the food consumption will increases when you're flying.
tooltip.smc.divine_wing_1: Also allows you gliding like Elytra, that will consume less food.
tooltip.smc.divine_wing_2: You can press jump key to consume some food level to perform a boost during gliding.
tooltip.smc.divine_halo: Decrease all damage by %s%s, immune fly into wall damage.
tooltip.smc.divine_halo_1: Each time taking damage, all negative effects are removed, and the damage reduction ability is decreased by %s%s, with a minimum reduction to %s%s. The ability will be reset for a certain period when you are not taking damage.
tooltip.smc.divine_halo_2: When suffering lethal damage, keep 1 HP and obtain a absorption hear equal to your max HP value. This item enters a long cooldown period and becomes ineffective.
tooltip.smc.divine_shard: When suffering lethal damage, keep 1 HP. This item enters a long cooldown period and becomes ineffective.
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_0: Crafting with specific items to unlock challenge, can be use for crafting after finished the challenge
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_1: Purify Challenge: Cure %s negative effects at one time.
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_2: Ward Challenge: Take damage from Warden by %s times.
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_3: Sky Challenge: y height higher than %s
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_4: Tough Challenge: Active vanilla Totem %s times.
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_5: Infused with the power of purify
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_6: Infused with the power of ward
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_7: Infused with the power of sky
tooltip.smc.divine_shard_8: Infused with the power of tough
tooltip.smc.god_pickaxe_1: Smashing - Breaking Ancient Debris will drop two Netherite Scraps
tooltip.smc.god_pickaxe_2: Smelting - Auto smelting, but no extra XP drop
tooltip.smc.god_pickaxe_5: Magnetic - Items will drop at your position
tooltip.smc.treasure_detector: Similar to Ore Detector, but only detect container with loot table tag.
tooltip.smc.bad_apple: Apply or Increase Bad Omen effect level.
tooltip.smc.astera_milkshake: Each active effects will heal 4 health for you.
tooltip.smc.broccoli_milkshake: Clear all effects for you and all nearby mobs.
tooltip.smc.frost_milkshake: Diffuse all effects on you to all nearby mobs.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_milkshake: Reallocate all effects duration on you.
tooltip.smc.frost_cake: Add Glowing effect with longer duration to entities around you, all mobs which are hostile to you will additionally apply Frost effect.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_cake_0: Trigger one of these effects randomly：
tooltip.smc.rainbow_cake_3: +1 level for one of your effect
tooltip.smc.broccoli_bomb: Throwable mining bomb! Powerful, can extract those precious ores.
tooltip.smc.salt_fish_sword: Deal higher damage and apply Stun effect on target when user is in water.
tooltip.smc.easter_bunny_egg: Place in world to hatch an Easter Bunny which can laying spawn eggs.
tooltip.smc.chicken_harvester_egg: Throw is to spawn a chicken harvester which can harvest and grow crops.
tooltip.smc.fried_easter_bunny_egg: There are actually three egg yolks of different colors! But is this really something worth doing for you?
tooltip.smc.fried_chicken_harvester_egg: Smells like a hundred fried chickens, roasted chickens and grilled chickens placed right in front of you!
tooltip.smc.easter_bunny_egg_sandwich: The fluffy and soft bread, paired with the sweet and delicious fried eggs, might be worth it...
tooltip.smc.chicken_harvester_egg_sandwi: It's worth sacrificing an entire lifetime for this crazy Thursday!
tooltip.smc.dandelion_salad: The painful memories of the past...
tooltip.smc.fox_suit_0: Fox will not be afraid of you and immune sweet berries and falling damage when you wearing full set.
tooltip.smc.fox_hat: Provide night vision in darker space.
tooltip.smc.fox_tail: Fox will not be afraid of you and immune sweet berries and falling damage when you wearing full set. Can walk on powder snow.
tooltip.smc.fox_tail_0: When you stop sneaking, your jumps will be higher and your attack speed will be increased for a certain period of time.
tooltip.smc.fox_tail_1: Can defence damage once when not in cooldown, your next damage will increase by that damage.
tooltip.smc.zinc_tool: Increase attack damage when powered, consume power instead of consuming durability.
tooltip.smc.zinc_tool_0: Increase digging range to 3 * 3 plane when powered.
tooltip.smc.battery: Consuming durability to power Zincite tools in inventory.
tooltip.smc.spear_gun: When hooking the block and retrieve while not sneaking, you can pull yourself towards the target. You can also pull the hooked object with greater force, even fishing.
tooltip.smc.jinkera: Fertilizing crops and saplings immediately in a wide range instantly.
tooltip.smc.golden_hanger_0: Hold right mouse to shoot yourself forward, and hurt the target deals damage equal to your own armor value.
tooltip.smc.fox_fur: Fox has change to drop this item when moving inside sweet berry bush blocks.
tooltip.smc.snow_fox_fur: Snow Fox has change to drop this item when moving inside sweet berry bush blocks.
tooltip.smc.pure_fox_fur: Fox with cloud block in mouth has change to drop this item when moving inside sweet berry bush blocks (consume cloud block).
tooltip.smc.meowmere: Shoot meow ball when swinging, meow ball can bounce between blocks and can go through enemies.
tooltip.smc.road_sign: Has chance to loot target's hand when killing.
tooltip.smc.zenish_1: Shoot traceable flying swords quickly to the target you're looking, target killing by flying sword is regard as killing by weapon in killer's hand.
tooltip.smc.frostium_shackles: Remove all extra step height, can absorb Anvil to decrease your moving speed, increase your knock back resistance and armor.
tooltip.smc.template_shroud: Can absorb Smithing Template Items to increase armor value. Cannot absorb Smithing Template Items which had been absorbed.
tooltip.smc.template_shroud_1: Provide Absorption hearts each %s seconds, hearts number as same as absorbed templates number.
tooltip.smc.bot: Can absorb and release xp, and release xp orb to repair equipments with mending enchantment. When named in number, the released xp level will not exceed that.
tooltip.smc.bot_1: Right-click to switch repair mode, repair mode:
tooltip.smc.bot_2: SHIFT Right-click to switch xp storage mode, current mode:
